scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='../../packages/database/node_modules/.prisma/client'; const dest='./node_modules/.prisma/client'; if(fs.existsSync(src)){ fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(file => { if(file.endsWith('.node') || file.endsWith('.js') || file.endsWith('.d.ts') || file === 'package.json' || file === 'schema.prisma'){ fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,file), path.join(dest,file)); } }); console.log('Synced Prisma Client from packages/database'); }"
